original: A squad of elite nyrean huntresses are circling around you, each carrying a long spear and wearing primitive banded armor over her chain bikini-wear. They’re each wearing a long cape around their shoulders, displaying a blood red sigil that looks like some combination of a woman and a tentacle monster. The guardswomen move with trained rigidity, attacking you from one side, then the other, probing your defenses. They don’t let up - somebody’s always jabbing at you with a spear or trying to grab you, making you defend from every direction at once!
